programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett is joined by comedian and actress Rose Matafeo for a two-day stay in Sweden's third city, Malmö. After checking into their circus-themed hotel, the pair make use of the complimentary bikes to discover the city. Attractions include The Disgusting Food Museum, where the tickets double as sick bags as they challenge the notion of what is and isn't edible. Next day, the duo appreciate the 19th-century splendour of the Ribersborg Kallbadhus, enjoying a sauna fand an icy dip in a seawater pool. They then hotfoot it to Folkets park for a round of Malmö-themed mini golf

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Four sets of campsite proprietors battle it out to be named best value, with the competition beginning at Amber's Bell Tent Camping in Mannington, Norfolk, a retro-styled pre-erected campsite where artistic host Amber Wykes challenges her guests to go native with a series of bushcraft trials. Over dinner, guests Derek and Julie's opinions on glamping irritate both Amber, and glampsite owners Nick and Sheila. Then back at the tents, brother-and-sister team Russell and Jane aren't too impressed with the sleeping arrangements. In the morning, the self-catering breakfast leads to complaints aimed squarely at Amber

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second day of the competition is at Park Farm Camping and Caravan Site in Norfolk, where husband and wife team Derek and Julie Nice are proud to show off their budget, family-friendly site. Former marksman Derek treats his guests to a spot of clay pigeon shooting, bringing out his competitive side

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to 500-year-old Layer Marney Tower in Essex for the third day of the competition, where they are welcomed into luxury glamping lodges by Nick and Sheila Charrington. The guests have little to complain about with the accommodation, but a revelation over dinner changes how they see things. Plus, a treasure hunt organised by the hosts sends one team on a wild goose chase

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Day four is at the Foxhunter Park in Kent, where brother and sister Jane Stacey and Russell Saunders own a caravan site that includes a bistro and entertainment. The accommodation is luxurious but the large scale of the site does not sit well with the campers - and the evening entertainment of a fire-eating limbo dancer leaves most of them cold

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The campers meet for the final time to find out what they thought one another's stay was worth. Amber is offended by Derek's low scoring, while he is thrown by Nick and Sheila's feedback. Russell and Jane have an axe to grind with Derek whose low scoring of their park is made worse by what they see as a personal attack on their hosting, while Nick and Sheila appear to emerge relatively unscathed

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug goes into hospital to have his appendix removed - but while sedated, he unwittingly reveals a catalogue of sexual fantasies, none of which involve Carrie

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: With facility failings, bathroom blues and even one set of B&Bers refusing to even try out one of their rivals' rooms all on the agenda, Payment Day is set to be a feisty occasion. It remains to be seen who will emerge victorious when the dust settles

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate BBQ
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks his barbecue breakfast, which takes a much-loved classic to smoky heights, then serves up his smoke-kissed sesame chicken burger, accompanied by crunchy slaw and Korean-inspired sauce. His veggie barbecue platter offers the perfect spread, comprising smoky baba ghanoush, dressed roasted peppers, minty courgettes and halloumi cheese with apricots, then finishes off with his surf 'n' turf mixed grill, cooked on a plancha griddle with butter and wine

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem (2023)
programme.desc: Turtle brothers Donatello, Leonardo, Michelangelo and Raphael have been raised in the sewers of New York by their mentor Splinter. The wise rat has sheltered his four wards from the cruelty of the human world but the brothers yearn to be accepted as normal teenagers by New Yorkers. They hope to win human hearts by performing selfless, heroic deeds with the help of their new friend April O'Neil. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Nicolas Cantu and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Karol and Richard with their tired and impractical three-bedroom bungalow in St Osyth, Essex. They bought their home in 2022 after Richard's long-term prostate cancer diagnosis, hoping that single-storey living would ease future care but the practical plan has sparked tension. Karol is ready to list it. She's fed up with the dated décor, the tiny kitchen that can't fit the washing machine, and the single bathroom. But Richard is convinced that these issues can be solved. He would rather use the £22,000 potential moving costs to improve their house, but after 18 months of stasis, he needs Kirstie's help to find a way forward. Working with a £60,000 Love It budget, Kirstie proposes an internal reconfiguration to bring balance back to the home. But with Richard adjusting her plans from the beginning, she must draw on all her expertise to keep the project on course. Meanwhile, Phil faces his own challenges, finding sun-kissed gardens to satisfy Karol and enough kitchen storage for Richard, all within his £525,000 List It budget

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts an evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience assembled at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Each week, Michael introduces sets by his fellow stand-ups, musical performances, dance revues and various other hijinks. He begins by inviting R&B star Tinie Tempah to perform, and the Peres Brothers Group put on a dazzling acrobatic show. The host also hijacks former Spice Girl Geri Horner's mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire of an embassassing message to all the contacts in her directory, and one unsuspecting member of the public is given a chance to sing a special duet with Michael Ball in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian introduces another evening of entertainment at London's Theatre Royal. He is joined on stage by fellow funnyman Josh Widdicombe, and introduces an acrobatic performance by Canadian duo Chilly and Fly. Bryan Adams and Jess Glynne provide the night's musical diversions, and singer Ronan Keating risks his personal and professional relationships when he hands Michael his mobile phone in Celebrity Sent To All. Plus, a locksmith who thinks he has come to fix a faulty lock at the theatre receives the surprise of his life in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show

programme.desc: Part one of two. Joey lands a date with a fan, but soon learns she is unhinged. Ross tries to track down Marcel at San Diego Zoo, and Phoebe is hired for a new singing job. Brooke Shields, Chris Isaak and Dan Castellaneta guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Rachel has a hard time dealing with Ross's new relationship and turns to Paolo for comfort. Monica strikes up a friendship with her brother's latest girlfriend, and Chandler has a bad experience with Joey's tailor

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Breast Milk
programme.desc: Monica goes shopping with Julie and tries to keep it a secret from Rachel. Phoebe manages to unwittingly disgust everyone, while, at his day job, Joey competes with a fellow cologne salesman

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian returns with the third series of his family entertainment show, recorded in front of a live audience at London's Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. He begins proceedings this time around with music by chart-topping Scottish singer-songwriter Emeli Sandé, and a stand-up set by Joe Lycett, before returning to the stage to deliver some of his own new material. Former Labour Party politician Ed Balls plays Celebrity Send to All, and Michael gives one unsuspecting member of the public their 15 minutes of fame in Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The stand-up star hosts another evening of entertainment at London's Theatre Royal. This time, EastEnders actor Danny Dyer hands over his phone to Michael for another Celebrity Send to All, and Gary Barlow puts in a special appearance. Comedian Russell Kane takes to the stage for a set, as does the host himself, and Grammy Award-winning electropop three-piece Clean Bandit provide the music. Plus, Michael gives another member of the public a chance to claim the spotlight in Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.title: Jimmy Carr's Am I the A**hole?
programme.desc: GK Barry, Jamali Maddix and Jimmmy pass judgement on people including a woman who lied about her age to a partner and a mother who took extreme measures over her daughter's mess

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Ray's interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Prom Video
programme.desc: Joey gives Chandler a hideous bracelet as a sign of their friendship, while Rachel insists she has no time for Ross - until Monica's old prom video helps her see him in a different light. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian's entertainment showcase continues, as he invites pop singer-songwriter Jessie J and Welsh rockers Stereophonics to join him on stage at London's Theatre Royal. Football pundit and former England player Alan Shearer shows he's a good sport by handing over his phone for Celebrity Send to All, and Michael sneaks into another house for another Midnight Gameshow. Plus, another comedy routine by the man himself, and a member of the public is given a chance to step into the spotlight in Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian's Saturday night entertainment showcase continues, as celebrity couple and TV presenting duo Marvin and Rochelle Humes both hand over their phones for the show's first-ever double Send-to-All. Pop-rock outfit The Vamps perform on-stage, and Michael showcases some of his new material. Plus, an extra in an in-production advert suddenly finds himself under the spotlight as the Unexpected Star of the Show

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment, as Irish singer and One Direction graduate Niall Horan performs on stage. Also delighting the masses tonight is Michael's fellow funnyman Jason Manford, and actress, comedienne and accomplished prat-faller Miranda Hart risks offending her family and friends as she hands her phone over in Celebrity Send-to-All. Plus, an A&E doctor is tricked into believing the theatre is actually a grand hotel as the host stages another ambitious Unexpected Star stunt

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The buffoon wreaks havoc when he goes shopping and dines at an exclusive restaurant - and there is an unfortunate incident when he meets a member of the royal family at a film premiere. Rowan Atkinson stars

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The hero bumbles his way through a disaster-packed day that takes him from the swimming baths and lunch in the park on to a night at the cinema with his girlfriend. Rowan Atkinson stars, with Angus Deayton and Matilda Ziegler

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson leaves his brain at home once more to play the bungling buffoon of few words. He goes shopping for a new TV, has problems with an itchy foot and takes a lucky girl for a night on the town - leaving the usual trail of chaos in his wake

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Underdog Gets Away
programme.desc: Joey is rejected by his family and Phoebe is not relishing the thought of spending the holidays with her grandmother and her boyfriend, prompting a mass exodus to Monica's for Thanksgiving dinner. Meanwhile, Ross hears Susan is trying to communicate with his and Carol's unborn child

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates New Year's Eve with a party at Monica and Rachel's flat, while Ross tries to alleviate his loneliness by getting a new room-mate - a monkey. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's flamboyant mother breezes into town for an appearance on The Jay Leno Show to talk about her career as a writer of erotic fiction - and throws her embarrassed son into a panic by inviting everyone out to dinner. Meanwhile, Monica and Phoebe compete for the attention of a man in a coma. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild and Jay Leno

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Dozen Lasagnes
programme.desc: Monica finds herself with a dozen large lasagnes on her hands, and Rachel ends her relationship with Paolo because he made a pass at Phoebe. Meanwhile, Joey and Chandler are shopping for new kitchen furniture when a football table catches their eye

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler catches a glimpse of Rachel in the nude - so she promptly demands he bare all to redress the balance. Meanwhile, Joey is disturbed to hear his father is having an affair. With a guest appearance by Brenda Vaccaro

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Candy Hearts
programme.desc: Ross bumps into his ex-wife, while Chandler meets an old flame during a double date with Joey, and Rachel, Monica and Phoebe have a run-in with some firefighters

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Stoned Guy
programme.desc: Monica applies to become head chef in a fancy restaurant, but the owner proves to be so high on drugs he is unable to appreciate the food she prepares to impress him. Guest starring Melora Hardin (The Office: An American Workplace) and Jon Lovitz

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Two Parts - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Phoebe feels neglected when she learns that Joey has fallen in love with her identical twin, while Chandler experiences trouble when he is asked to fire an attractive employee. Ross had last-minute doubts about becoming a parent. Guest starring Helen Hunt

programme.title: Dr Dolittle 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The vet with a talent for talking to animals comes to the aid of forest creatures that need his help protecting their homes from land developers. He also has to deal with the love life of a circus bear that has fallen for a wild female. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy and Kevin Pollak, with the voices of Steve Zahn, Lisa Kudrow and Isaac Hayes

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Walsh Senior and Junior embark on another challenge-filled road trip and this time they are in for a real culture shock as they head to Latin America. They start out in Mexico, where they grapple with one of the country's most famous sports - lucha libre wrestling. The next day they are in for a fright when they visit an eerie island inhabited by creepy, decrepit dolls - but something far more scary is waiting for them when they find themselves clinging to the side of a mountain

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes are still in Mexico and still on the side of a mountain. Can they complete the final part of the challenge, which requires Bradley to swing across the top of the mountain with nothing but a terrifying drop below him? Once recovered, the father and son head toward Mexico's coast, where Barney takes his dad inside a pitch-black cave that's home to snakes and thousands of bats. They also have fun at a waterpark before joining the cast of Cirque du Soleil

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Two Parts - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel and Monica fall out over two hunky doctors, played by Noah Wyle and George Clooney, while Ross muses with his father on impending parenthood. Emmy-nominated episode of the American comedy, with Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, David Schwimmer and Elliott Gould

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Poker
programme.desc: Rachel and Monica suffer a humiliating defeat while playing poker with Chandler and Joey, and demand a rematch. Rachel decides to look for a new job - but is not as successful as she had hoped

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away
programme.desc: Rachel loses Ross's pet monkey, prompting the gang to form a search party to find it, but an animal warden with a grudge gets in the way. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.sub-title: The One with the Evil Orthodontist
programme.desc: Chandler finds it tough being ignored by a woman he has just taken out on a first date, and Rachel gets back with her double-dealing former fiance Barry - even though he is now engaged to someone else. Guest starring Jennifer Grey

programme.desc: Ross tries to find a new home for his pet monkey, which has reached puberty and begun driving everyone crazy with its uncontrollable antics. Meanwhile, Monica sets out to catch the thief responsible for stealing her credit card. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox

programme.desc: Phoebe learns the truth about her father, while a malfunctioning radiator in Monica's apartment goes into overdrive, making her Christmas celebrations steamier than anticipated. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel meets a man called Russ who bears an uncanny resemblance to Ross, further confusing her already muddled emotions. Meanwhile, Joey discovers he will have to pass an intimate audition on the casting couch to get a part in a daytime soap

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: Carol and Susan prepare for their wedding, with help from an uncomfortable Ross, while Rachel is shocked by an announcement from her mother - she is getting divorced and plans to go on a voyage of sexual self-discovery. Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After the Super Bowl - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Joey lands a date with a fan, but soon learns she is unhinged. Ross tries to track down Marcel at San Diego Zoo, and Phoebe is hired for a new singing job. Brooke Shields, Chris Isaak and Dan Castellaneta guest star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After the Super Bowl - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel tries to fix up Monica with action-movie star Jean-Claude Van Damme, but ends up landing a date with him herself. Meanwhile, Chandler gets his comeuppance for a high-school prank he played on a former classmate. Guest starring Julia Roberts

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Walsh Senior and Junior embark on another challenge-filled road trip and this time they are in for a real culture shock as they head to Latin America. They start out in Mexico, where they grapple with one of the country's most famous sports - lucha libre wrestling. The next day they are in for a fright when they visit an eerie island inhabited by creepy, decrepit dolls - but something far more scary is waiting for them when they find themselves clinging to the side of a mountain

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Walshes are still in Mexico and still on the side of a mountain. Can they complete the final part of the challenge, which requires Bradley to swing across the top of the mountain with nothing but a terrifying drop below him? Once recovered, the father and son head toward Mexico's coast, where Barney takes his dad inside a pitch-black cave that's home to snakes and thousands of bats. They also have fun at a waterpark before joining the cast of Cirque du Soleil

programme.title: Working Girl (1988)
programme.desc: Naive but ambitious secretary Tess discovers her conniving boss has been claiming credit for her ideas. She hatches a plan to get revenge and further her own career into the bargain, with a little help from the unscrupulous executive's boyfriend. Comedy, starring Melanie Griffith, Sigourney Weaver, Harrison Ford, Joan Cusack and Alec Baldwin

programme.title: Police Squad!
programme.desc: Dauntless detective Frank Drebin struggles to identify background noise on a ransom tape in the hope of locating an abducted heiress. Leslie Nielsen stars as the bumbling cop

programme.title: Police Squad!
programme.desc: Drebin investigates the death of an eminent judge, and goes undercover at a nightclub where he discovers a chorus girl, a shady ex-con and his former wife are involved in an ill-fated love triangle. Leslie Nielsen stars as the bumbling cop

programme.title: Iain Stirling's Roast the Internet
programme.desc: The host is joined by Tom Allen, Desiree Burch and Vicky Pattison for a savage scroll through the most absurd corners of the internet, from Gen Z to dodgy travel trends

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas, Vernon Kay, Paul Chowdhry and Katherine Ryan join regular team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock on the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. The teams answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country to see who best understands what is going on in Britain today

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Jillian Michaels guests on the comic improv show, with regulars Wayne Brady, Heather Anne Campbell, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: Dragony Aunts
programme.desc: Crystal Rasmussen and Candy Warhol meet Brennan Reece, who is having trouble adjusting to his parents' divorce, and Nicole, who wants to know when to introduce new partners to her daughter

programme.title: Russell Howard: Wonderbox
programme.desc: Russell performs his usual brand of social commentary and discusses some of the joy to be found in everyday experiences. Recorded in front of his home crowd in Bristol

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: Tony's pitch for an important proposal is undermined by computer issues, while Nat and Rhonda deal with community backlash from a prematurely announced construction project

programme.title: Teachers
programme.desc: Mary Louise's attempt to use an Alexa-type AI device in her classroom backfires, while Caroline co-opts one of her student's projects because she needs a win

programme.title: Stupid Central
programme.desc: Comedian Babatunde Aléshé presents how not to be a ninja, farmyard flops, and boys taking on girls in an epic grudge match

programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family-run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart develops a crush on babysitter Laura Powers and plots to break up her relationship with bullying boyfriend Jimbo Jones - but things do not turn out as planned. Featuring the voice of Sara Gilbert (Roseanne, The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's new snowplough business proves an unexpected success but drives a wedge between him and Barney, who decides to operate a rival service. Featuring the voices of Linda Ronstadt and Adam West

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wonders when Maggie will say her first word, which prompts Marge to reminisce about Lisa's early days and how a two-year-old Bart suffered a serious outbreak of sibling jealousy. Featuring the guest voice of Elizabeth Taylor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer builds a robot for Bart to enter the Robot Rumble TV show, but finds the task harder than expected and resorts to trickery. Meanwhile, Lisa's pet cats keep dying

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge writes a novel and succeeds in getting it published to critical acclaim in the Springfield community. Homer is delighted - until he finds out its plot, which portrays him as an uncaring husband. With the guest voices of authors Tom Clancy and Thomas Pynchon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stages a revival of a musical from high school, but her pleasant memories are threatened by the return of an old rival

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Grampa falls victim to a phone scam, the rest of the Simpsons set out to get his money back. With the guest voice of Alan Cumming

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another selection of spooky stories, including parodies of Bambi and Parasite, and a tale of a tree coming to life after Homer chops it down

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Deep in Borneo, the four remaining teams battle to reach the grand finale. After breakfast with the orangutans, they raft rapids, dodge crocodiles, test their blowpipe skills and race to the finish

programme.title: Dog (2022)
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Briggs is determined to regain his place at Joint Base Lewis-McChord in Washington. His superior officer agrees to return him to the fold if he can successfully escort a military working dog named Lulu along America's Pacific Coast to attend the funeral of her handler. Comedy, co-directed by and starring Channing Tatum

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: Cynical, hard-drinking teacher Elizabeth Halsey hates her job and the kids in her class, and hopes to escape her daily grind by landing a rich husband. A wealthy substitute seems like a suitable candidate, but she has a rival for his attention in a squeaky-clean colleague. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. First up is 24-year-old Rebecca, a singer from Nottinghamshire who is tired of always having her heart broken by guys with a bad boy image and wants to see if choosing a date in the studio can help her pick a better mate. Next up is 25-year-old development manager Dan from Durham, who has unsuccessfully tried countless dating apps and hopes to find Mr Right

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, and Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars. Plus, reviews of Great British History Hunters, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, This Came Out of Me, Boris Johnson's appearance on Good Morning Britain, and BBC News. First shown in May 2022

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

Meanwhile, Joanne McNally invents a new catchphrase, Nick Mohammed and Sophie Willan both struggle with a bottle of water, John Robins gets creative with beans, and Little Alex Horne feels the thrill of victory

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, beautician Pam and ex-footballer Joey, serve up an Italian menu that confuses their guests. Finally, youngsters Ste and Danielle treat their guests to an American themed menu and Danielle's hidden talent, which leaves everyone gawping

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Northamptonshire, loved-up luvvies Anna and Coylah hope their menu will reflect their personalities, while Felicity and Lawrence, and Martin and Dawn also compete

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A groom-to-be from London is given £12,000 to arrange every detail of his civil partnership ceremony, but questions arise over whether his cabaret theme might prove too much for his unwitting partner. Meanwhile, the best man's antics threaten to derail the plans

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A Newquay surfer is given £12,000 to plan his nuptials and give his partner of four years the wedding of her dreams. However, his beach-based ideas threaten to derail the big day, and nine enthusiastic bridesmaids look set to dominate the proceedings

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bedfordshire man James is given the funds to provide his fiancee Mercy with her dream wedding, and plans to incorporate her Nigerian heritage into the ceremony. However, his laid-back attitude threatens to derail the process, and the pressure is on from the would-be bride's family to make sure each of the African nation's traditions is upheld during the nuptials

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan from Kidderminster, Worcestershire, arranges a farm-themed wedding for his fiancee Nicky, but quickly ends up out of his depth as he tries to navigate the complex worlds of bridal dresses and women's lingerie. Fortunately, he finds himself on more familiar ground as he prepares to build his ideal reception venue

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: After 11 months together 28-year-old trainee social worker Hywel proposed spontaneously to girlfriend Beca at a Blur gig. Now he intends to create a music festival-themed wedding for his fiancee in Bridgend, south Wales. However, the grim weather seems set to to ruin their big day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO and co-founder of massage therapy chain Massage Heights, poses as a contestant on a TV reality show who is trying fund her own business. After spending nine years moulding the company, she decides to find out first-hand how her retreats are doing so she can fix potential problems before expanding the business to 300 new locations

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bruce 'Two Dogs' Bozsum, the chairman of a Native American gaming and entertainment empire, goes undercover among his own employees to learn how he might be able to improve his organisation and ensure it flourishes for generations to come. He poses as a reality TV contestant who is trying to win funds to start up his own business, before revealing his true identity and offering rewards to some of the memorable people he has met

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay uses his wealth of experience in the restaurant business to help struggling hotels, motels and B&Bs across America. After identifying the most pressing issues at each location, he puts the owners and staff to work as he attempts to save their establishments from disaster. His first stop is Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, where the Roosevelt Inn is more than $1million in debt - and to make matters worse, the owner's wife has had enough

programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the Larry H Miller Group of Companies and co-owner of National Basketball Association team the Utah Jazz, goes undercover. On day two Linda and Steve cook up a tried-and-tested homemade menu, but Lisa is looking to find fault with the food. Finally, expectations are high for married couple Paul and Paul, who take a risk in search of rewards

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, long-time married couple Karen and Nigel kick off the competition with a Bajan menu inspired by Nigel's West Indian heritage. However, banter buddies Jo and Charlie aren't loving the Caribbean cuisine. On day two twenty-somethings Beth and Clem attempt to cook restaurant-standard food, with a celebrity twist. However, not everyone is a fan of the fine dining experience. Finally, Jo and Charlie rely on a night of Greek gastro goodies to win the £1,000 prize on offer

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Windsor, Vermont, on a mission to boost the fortunes of the Juniper Hill Inn, which may look impressive, but smells of raw sewage owing to a plumbing problem. After meeting the B&B's wealthy owner Robert Dean II, the chef uncovers some shocking treatment toward staff and realises he will need something approaching a miracle to save this business from disaster

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsay's visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the company's front-line employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Eric Casaburi, a former undercover boss, invites six other employers who also appeared incognito on the show to talk about their experiences of the programme at a restaurant. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In the fifth season, more couples put their homes in the bros' hands. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Part-time wrestler Lewis, 19, returns to the restaurant for a second chance as he sits down with 20-year-old barista Lauren, while hotel inspector Alasdair, 55, and 54-year-old DJ Lee bond over their shared love of pop music. Stu, who's 42, lost his sight 13 years ago and hopes to meet a redhead to settle down with, and his date is 37-year-old Bristol nurse Jen, who has been single for eight years and is looking for a man to ignite the flames of love

programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marge's favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides he wants a little brother, and unofficially adopts a youngster named Charlie from the local orphanage - much to the dismay of Lisa. With the guest voices of Kim Cattrall (Sex and the City) and American Football stars Peyton and Eli Manning

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a trip to a water park with the family, Grampa bumps into a newspaper columnist who seemingly becomes fascinated with his life and writes a series of stories about him, but Homer becomes suspicious of the journalist's motives

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Ratings for Krusty's TV show start to fall, so executives bring in co-star Princess Penelope (voiced by Anne Hathaway) to increase its appeal, and romance soon blossoms between the clown and his new sidekick. Elsewhere, Mr Burns cuts costs at the nuclear plant by taking away the staff's free doughnuts

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wins $1million on the lottery, but keeps it a secret from his family, fearing Marge's reaction if she finds out about it. He and Bart set about spending the money, and buy front-row tickets to a Coldplay concert. With the guest voice of Chris Martin

programme.title: I, Robot (2004)
programme.desc: The inventor of an advanced form of intelligent robot is found dead, and the detective investigating the case is certain that one of the scientist's mechanical creations is responsible - but no one believes his theory because the robots have been programmed to prevent them from harming humans. Sci-fi thriller, inspired by the Isaac Asimov stories, starring Will Smith, Bridget Moynahan and Alan Tudyk

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britain's favourite personalities hit the sofa to share their opinions of First Dates, Squid Game, Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection, Match Me Abroad, Building the Band and BBC News reports on the game of bingo and the return of Oasis

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Married at First Sight Australia, Pangolin: Kulu's Journey, The Honesty Box, Silence Is Golden and Good Luck to You, Leo Grande. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Race Across the World, The Piano, I Kissed a Boy, Made in Chelsea, Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen and a BBC Breakfast report on the then recently appointed Pope Leo XIV. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Britain's Got Talent, One Night Stand, and Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars. Plus, reviews of Great British History Hunters, Freeze the Fear with Wim Hof, This Came Out of Me, Boris Johnson's appearance on Good Morning Britain, and BBC News. First shown in May 2022

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Laboratory engineer Daniel, 39, attempts to keep his nerves under control when he meets 29-year-old lingerie designer Lauren, while six foot three firefighter Nikki hopes rugby player Ross will sweep her off her feet. Call centre worker Zoe, 21, is looking for an intelligent and ladylike bookworm and sits down for a meal with Grace, a well-read 22-year-old physics student with a penchant for grammatical correctness, and HR adviser Leah, 34, is matched with 37-year-old blue-eyed boy Andy from Middlesbrough

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Married at First Sight Australia, Pangolin: Kulu's Journey, The Honesty Box, Silence Is Golden and Good Luck to You, Leo Grande. From May 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions of shows including Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Race Across the World, The Piano, I Kissed a Boy, Made in Chelsea, Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen and a BBC Breakfast report on the then recently appointed Pope Leo XIV. From May 2025

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge poses for a charity calendar and becomes Springfield's number-one sex symbol, while Carl gets a promotion at the plant, before going on a power trip and hiring Homer as his new assistant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to get hold of the year's must-have gadget for Phil's birthday. Cam gets involved in a neighbour's marital problems, while Mitchell decides it is time to toughen up. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Ty Burrell, Eric Stonestreet and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke and Manny's hot-tempered basketball coach quits, causing Jay and Phil to compete for the position. Elsewhere, Mitchell introduces Cameron to a prospective employer. Comedy, starring Nolan Gould, Rico Rodriguez, Ed O'Neill and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is suspicious when Grandpa Dunphy pays a surprise visit, while Cameron tries to find his inner drummer when he joins Dylan's band. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria regret taking Manny to see a horror film. Comedy, guest starring Fred Willard

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, including a man pretending to be a walrus, an incredible downhill bike run and some computer keyboard hurling

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: Wedding bells ring for the final couple in the experiment, before all five sets of newly-weds jet off to Panama for their honeymoons

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: One of the brides receives a surprise gift on her honeymoon in Panama. Two other newly-weds struggle to deal with a massive bombshell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart misbehaves once too often, prompting Homer and Marge to impose a terrible punishment - banning him from ever going to see the new feature-length Itchy and Scratchy film, and standing firm despite his constant pleas

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job at the power plant to help with the cost of repairing the family home, which is sliding off its foundations. With the voice of Tom Jones

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family-run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart develops a crush on babysitter Laura Powers and plots to break up her relationship with bullying boyfriend Jimbo Jones - but things do not turn out as planned. Featuring the voice of Sara Gilbert (Roseanne, The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's new snowplough business proves an unexpected success but drives a wedge between him and Barney, who decides to operate a rival service. Featuring the voices of Linda Ronstadt and Adam West

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wonders when Maggie will say her first word, which prompts Marge to reminisce about Lisa's early days and how a two-year-old Bart suffered a serious outbreak of sibling jealousy. Featuring the guest voice of Elizabeth Taylor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer builds a robot for Bart to enter the Robot Rumble TV show, but finds the task harder than expected and resorts to trickery. Meanwhile, Lisa's pet cats keep dying

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge writes a novel and succeeds in getting it published to critical acclaim in the Springfield community. Homer is delighted - until he finds out its plot, which portrays him as an uncaring husband. With the guest voices of authors Tom Clancy and Thomas Pynchon

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge stages a revival of a musical from high school, but her pleasant memories are threatened by the return of an old rival

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Grampa falls victim to a phone scam, the rest of the Simpsons set out to get his money back. With the guest voice of Alan Cumming

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another selection of spooky stories, including parodies of Bambi and Parasite, and a tale of a tree coming to life after Homer chops it down

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Deep in Borneo, the four remaining teams battle to reach the grand finale. After breakfast with the orangutans, they raft rapids, dodge crocodiles, test their blowpipe skills and race to the finish

programme.title: Dog (2022)
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Briggs is determined to regain his place at Joint Base Lewis-McChord in Washington. His superior officer agrees to return him to the fold if he can successfully escort a military working dog named Lulu along America's Pacific Coast to attend the funeral of her handler. Comedy, co-directed by and starring Channing Tatum

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: Cynical, hard-drinking teacher Elizabeth Halsey hates her job and the kids in her class, and hopes to escape her daily grind by landing a rich husband. A wealthy substitute seems like a suitable candidate, but she has a rival for his attention in a squeaky-clean colleague. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, and BBC News

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and painter Josh sits down for a meal with student and part-time waitress Sophia, while Old Etonian Leslie and blogger Babs bond over a shared respect of Michelle Obama. Property developer Amanda is ready to begin dating again after her husband passed away, but she and sales executive Brad both have the distinct feeling they may have met before, while Sue returns to the restaurant after nerves got the better of her during her first visit

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, and BBC News

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed O'Neill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Durham compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with Steph and James, who offer a night of gastropub favourites. Day two sees animal-lovers Gary and Amanda serve up two courses of fish on their homely-menu, and hosts Andy and Emma feel confident on the final night of the competition

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Part-time wrestler Lewis, 19, returns to the restaurant for a second chance as he sits down with 20-year-old barista Lauren, while hotel inspector Alasdair, 55, and 54-year-old DJ Lee bond over their shared love of pop music. Stu, who's 42, lost his sight 13 years ago and hopes to meet a redhead to settle down with, and his date is 37-year-old Bristol nurse Jen, who has been single for eight years and is looking for a man to ignite the flames of love

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: It's time for another mixer, and PK Humble needs no encouragement to get his flirt on, but gets more than he bargained for. Also, there's nowhere to hide as the group receive unfiltered face-to-face feedback from dates old and new

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With the couples' Panama honeymoons drawing to a close, it's time for them to face up to the reality of everyday life with their new spouses. Some of them are excited to start planning for the future, while others are already craving more personal space. And one bride's attempt at intimacy takes an unexpected - and extremely awkward - turn

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A day at the roller-skating rink leaves Murray wishing he had not asked Erica to tell him about her life, while Pops steps in to help when a back-to-school shopping trip causes problems between Beverly and Adam. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. Beverly refuses to let Adam see a new horror film, but he goes behind her back and tricks Pops into taking him to the cinema. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. Outraged, the detective does everything in his power to prove him wrong, even if it means stepping outside his jurisdiction. Meanwhile, chaos ensues at the precinct after a computer virus publishes everyone's internet browser history

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But almost 2,000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria. Will Liam get everyone in the Christmas spirit, or will Georgia lose that loving feeling?

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: In the third elimination challenge of the series, the six teams have 10 hours to build an instantly recognisable scene from a classic TV show of their choice inside a pre-made hollow vintage TV. Guest judge Sophie Monk attempts to identify the shows, with three bonus points up for grabs if she doesn't need any clues

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: On Borneo, the final four teams get hands-on gutting fish at a bustling market and dive headfirst into a conservation mission. However, saving the planet takes a toll on the would-be eco warriors

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: I Do, Deep in the Heart of Austin
programme.desc: Ten singles from Austin, Texas are ready to marry complete strangers in the ultimate quest for love. The first two couples say I do, sparks fly for one pair, but first impressions falter when one newly-wed clashes with their in-laws and another faces a shocking twist with their new family

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.sub-title: Don't Mess with My Texas Wedding
programme.desc: Four more singles prepare to meet their matches at the altar, but it's not the first time some of them have said 'I do'. The two couples who've already tied the knot spend their first night together

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marge's favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: Three stories of vengeance, featuring Homer being accused of treason in post-revolutionary France, Milhouse leading a rebellion of misfits in modern-day Springfield and a new crimefighter by the name of Red Revenge takes to the streets of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is awarded a driving licence for saving Springfield from a fire, and finds himself tied down when he develops a serious relationship with a teenage girl in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Lisa lands herself in trouble by falsely claiming Native American heritage. With the voice of Natalie Portman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa accepts an invitation to join a Wiccan coven - but before she can be initiated, Chief Wiggum arrives and arrests the other members on charges of witchcraft. Meanwhile, Homer befriends local hillbilly Cletus, eager to share his plentiful supply of illegal moonshine liquor

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Deep in Borneo, the four remaining teams battle to reach the grand finale. After breakfast with the orangutans, they raft rapids, dodge crocodiles, test their blowpipe skills and race to the finish

programme.title: Dog (2022)
programme.desc: US Army Ranger Briggs is determined to regain his place at Joint Base Lewis-McChord in Washington. His superior officer agrees to return him to the fold if he can successfully escort a military working dog named Lulu along America's Pacific Coast to attend the funeral of her handler. Comedy, co-directed by and starring Channing Tatum

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: Cynical, hard-drinking teacher Elizabeth Halsey hates her job and the kids in her class, and hopes to escape her daily grind by landing a rich husband. A wealthy substitute seems like a suitable candidate, but she has a rival for his attention in a squeaky-clean colleague. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Jason Segel and Lucy Punch

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, and BBC News

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and painter Josh sits down for a meal with student and part-time waitress Sophia, while Old Etonian Leslie and blogger Babs bond over a shared respect of Michelle Obama. Property developer Amanda is ready to begin dating again after her husband passed away, but she and sales executive Brad both have the distinct feeling they may have met before, while Sue returns to the restaurant after nerves got the better of her during her first visit

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Britain's Got Talent, Bridgerton, Romeo and Duet, The 1% Club, Inside the Force: 24/7, Piers Morgan Uncensored, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, and BBC News

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed O'Neill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: The Hutchinson family are faced with a devastating reality, Beth extends an olive branch to her estranged brother, and Charlie falls on his sword, but not everyone's ready to forgive and forget. Meanwhile, Misbah plays matchmaker, Frankie wants to do the right thing, and Jenson supports Mercedes. Prince is smitten with Vicky, but does she feel the same? Warren makes a chilling discovery, and Nancy reaches breaking point

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: At the police station, Charlie is feeling the pressure as he's pushed for answers on what caused him to be distracted. At the Loft, sick of Jenson and his remarks, Warren gives him money to leave the village. Frankie apologises to Caleb admitting she does like him and plans on doing the right thing

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren remains determined to show Mercedes that Jenson isn't who she thinks he is. Dripping in aftershave, Prince goes round to the Maaliks to see Vicky. A spiralling Nancy tears a strip off Maddox in the village after overhearing him talk about her family to Ant - Beth and Jonah intervene

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Durham compete to host the best dinner party, beginning with Steph and James, who offer a night of gastropub favourites. Day two sees animal-lovers Gary and Amanda serve up two courses of fish on their homely-menu, and hosts Andy and Emma feel confident on the final night of the competition

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.desc: Ina makes some hot and spicy dishes. She starts with an exotic lamb and chickpea curry, and then makes lobster corn fritters with creamy sriracha sauce

programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue is joined by food campaigner and author Henry Dimbleby, who shows her how to make a one-pot veggie dish and lifts the lid on the school-dinner revolution he's been leading. Meanwhile, Prue's husband John is dispatched to catch dinner as he tries his hand netting trout at a nearby fish farm, while she makes an orange and polenta upside down cake

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates a fresh spin on a fast-food favourite, preparing a bucket of fried chicken with rainbow slaw, sweet sticky potato wedges and charred corn on the cob, and he makes enough to feed a family of four for less than £10. The chef also shares tips on getting crispy chicken skin without having to deep-fry, and rustles up spiced sausage bake, garlic bread and a meat-free roast, as well as two very different recipes for leftover salmon

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the series in which enthusiastic home cooks take part in a contest to determine which of them is Britain's best amateur baker. The first stop on their nationwide tour is the Cotswolds, where judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood challenge them to make their signature cakes and tackle a recipe for Victoria sponge. The week's final task sees them producing a tricky chocolate celebration cake. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: With their numbers reduced from 10 to eight, the enthusiastic home cooks take part in the next stage of the contest, heading for Scone Palace near Perth. Here, they are challenged to bake their signature biscuits, scones and petit fours with meringues, choux pastry and macaroons. The judges are Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The six remaining contestants head for Sarre Windmill in Kent for the third round of the competition. Here, they are challenged to bake the perfect loaf, under the watchful eyes of Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood. Meanwhile, Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins taste Britain's earliest bread roll and discover the hidden history of the sandwich

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The five remaining contestants head for Bakewell in Derbyshire, where they are challenged to reinvent classics such as peach and blueberry, sticky toffee, and rhubarb and orange Betty puddings. Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins discover how the nation's favourite desserts helped change Britain's image abroad

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The competitors reach the penultimate round of the contest, heading to the Cornish village of Mousehole to test their pastry-making skills. They are challenged to produce their own versions of hearty British classics, while Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins examine the history of pies, detailing their slightly more sinister past

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The three remaining contestants head for Fulham Palace in London for the grand final, where they are challenged to use all their skills to recreate the 19th-century tea parties once hosted in the area. Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood are joined by former competitors to pass judgement on the items offered, before Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins present the victor with the Bake Off trophy

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam dives into Tottenham's football food culture. He tries lamb ravioli in the stadium, and small plates at a restaurant serving West African tapas

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programme.desc: Adam is in Manchester to watch the Red Devils play. He gets stuck into an epic seafood boil and a new sweet and savoury take on sourdough pizza

programme.title: Man v Food

programme.title: Man v Food

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James crosses over the Irish Sea to Northern Ireland, where he is joined by famous local chef Paul Rankin. Their first port of call is the Giant's Causeway, where James cooks a fish stew for the crowds, followed by a visit to a family farm in Limavady, where Paul learns how their award-winning rapeseed oil is produced. Things get competitive as the chefs compete in a hovercraft race, and finally James takes to the seas to fish for mackerel
