programme.desc: Twelve new contestants make their way into the famous tent, hoping they have what it takes to bake their way to the final. They start off with cake week, and a signature challenge in which they must produce 12 mini rolls, before working out the recipe for a nostalgic teatime classic in the technical. For the showstopper, the bakers are asked to express their creativity with cakes designed to defy the laws of physics. Presented by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's crunch time for the bakers as biscuit week arrives and they are asked to produce their take on filled brandy snaps, followed by a jammy childhood favourite in the technical challenge. In the showstopper, they have to come up with an interactive toy made entirely from biscuit. Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas find out who will be top cookie and who will crumble under the pressure, while Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present as the amateurs demonstrate their bread-baking skills, putting their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the signature challenge and making a Greek-inspired snack in the technical. On day two, judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task them with creating an artistic showpiece rendering decorative designs in milk bread. Who will be leaving the tent this week?

programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper strike a deal with black marketeers to replace a hijacked supply of hydrocortisone - in exchange for Henry's antique oak desk. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda, Wayne Rogers and Gary Burghoff

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: Whatever Happened to the Class of '56?
programme.desc: The Ingalls attend a farmers' convention where they bump into several old friends. While Charles tries to persuade the smaller landowners to stand up to their considerably bigger rivals, Caroline is surprised to discover how few of her former acquaintances are happy with their lives. Michael Landon and Karen Grassle star

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: During a stormy night, Laura and Mary are taken hostage by escaped convicts and held in the school. When one of their number falls ill, they demand Laura fetch a doctor - but she returns with her father

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura delights in teaching a shy boy how to communicate using sign-language, but reckons without the youngster falling in love with her. Letting him down gently, she admits that her heart belongs to another - but must pluck up the courage to tell the object of her affections to his face

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: May We Make Them Proud - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Albert leaves a smoking pipe in the basement of the school for the blind, and tragedy strikes when the building is engulfed in fire - causing the death of two children

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: May We Make Them Proud - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Albert is beside himself by guilt over causing the fire which claimed the lives of the Garveys and Mary's children. As the devastated mothers try to cope with their losses, he finds comfort from an unlikely source

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Almanzo's brother Perley arrives in Walnut Grove, and his skill with a sick horse makes a good impression on Charles, who thinks he would be a perfect match for Laura. However, as time passes it becomes clear that one of the Wilder brothers already has his eye on her

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nels Oleson takes his travelling store into the countryside in a bid to escape his nagging wife's harsh tongue - but doesn't expect to fall in love. Drama, starring Richard Bull

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: He Loves Me, He Loves Me Not - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The death of Adam's father jeopardises plans to build a new school for the blind in Walnut Grove. Almanzo proposes to Laura, but she is heartbroken when Charles forbids them to marry until she is 18. Drama, starring Melissa Gilbert, Michael Landon and Dean Butler

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: He Loves Me, He Loves Me Not - Part Two

programme.desc: During a stormy night, Laura and Mary are taken hostage by escaped convicts and held in the school. When one of their number falls ill, they demand Laura fetch a doctor - but she returns with her father

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death

programme.desc: Gage goes undercover to investigate dealers selling a designer drug called White Buffalo, while Walker tries to solve the mystery of a statue that appears to cry

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Romano poses as a male stripper to infiltrate a nightclub where a gang of ruthless drug-dealers are operating. William Shatner stars

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a 13-year-old girl who has diabetes and has collapsed at home experiencing a hypo. Treated on the same shift is a 51-year-old man who's also struggling to control his blood sugars. The paramedics suspect a condition called ketoacidosis, which is life threatening if not dealt with fast. A handstand gone wrong leaves a teenager in agony with a suspected fractured shoulder. A baby boy is struggling to breath and paramedics are called to a 24-year-old man who has autism and may have had a seizure

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who's tripped over her laptop cable and has badly broken her leg. She endures a night with next to no pain relief before eventually ringing 999. A mental health patient experiences an episode of psychosis at a homeless hostel. As she has threatened staff and set off fire alarms, the police have become involved. A man is found passed out on a city centre street wearing carpet slippers, a young woman with epilepsy has a seizure on a bus, while a man who fails to make it back to his bed after a trip to the bathroom is forced to seek help

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 78-year-old man has difficulty breathing after breaking several ribs by tripping over a kerb, and doctors discover that a woman is in the latter stages of pancreatic cancer when they treat her for sepsis. Elsewhere, a 32-year-old woman is treated after bruising her neck and face when she slipped on wet decking on a night out with friends

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients whose visions of the world are rocked by life-changing events, including 44-year-old Sergio, who is flown in by air ambulance after a cycling accident. Another cyclist - 71-year-old Alan - arrives in resus after being in a collision with a van. Doctors suspect a head injury and multiple fractures. Alan's wife Jenny reveals how she met him and how a sudden accident involving her son burst their idyll and took their lives on an unexpected path

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gin's recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This contest kicks off in north Norfolk at The Hero, run by best friends Harry Farrow and Rowan Glennie, who both quit university to follow their dream of becoming hospitality entrepreneurs. Debbie and Arthur from The Cleasewood Guest House are wowed by the view, but Shoukry and Waguih from Four Saints Brig y Don wonder if size really does matter. During an afternoon cheese-wrapping contest at a local dairy farm, Helen and Suzanne from Peel Hey show their perfectionist side, while Arthur and Debbie's sneaky tactics raise eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Cleasewood Guest House in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, a labour of love for rookie B&B owners Debbie and Arthur Callaghan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Peel Hey on the Wirral, where Helen Holmes and Suzanne Hill hope their years of experience will give them the edge over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Shoukry Rozek welcomes his rivals to Four Saints Brig y Don in Llandudno, north Wales, where the sea views impress some guests, although the buffet breakfast proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners are meeting for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Hero is first, and hosts Harry and Rowan Glennie want to know why their female guests thought their rooms were too boyish to cut the mustard

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired tugboat captain and keen skier Geoff is torn between his love of the sea and the mountains. Taking command, Laura Hamilton sets out to find him a holiday home around the coastal town of Adra, near the Sierra Nevada in southern Spain, that offers the perfect balance. With support from Geoff's sister Jackie, Laura lines up five options for him to consider within his £120,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Five years ago, Susan and Matt honeymooned in Crete, and nowhere else has had quite the same impact on them. Now Matt has retired, they've decided it's high time they bought their very own property there. They'd love a two-bedroom villa that they can move to permanently, so call on the house-hunting talents of Laura Hamilton to find them the best option for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King is in Spain's Orihuela Costa to help Donna and Graeme find their perfect holiday home. They're after a light and airy two or three-bedroom apartment. Leah seeks out five impressive properties for the couple's budget of £75,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debbie and Dave from West Sussex want to fulfil their long-held dream of owning a holiday home in the Dordogne region of France. With a budget of £200,000, Jonnie Irwin lines up five potential options, but whether any will prove to be the perfect place remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition heads to south-east London, where first to host is 25-year-old online journalist Leah, who hopes her Mediterranean feast of mixed-mezze and lamb kleftiko will win her the £1,000 cash prize. Other contestants include art events organiser Gina, Italian personal trainer Vincenzo and pub manager Josh

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Vincenzo hosts the second night in south-east London, where he hopes to impress his guests with traditional recipes handed down through his Italian family and a spot of salsa dancing. The guests also engage in some dicey debating - ensuring there is never a dull moment to the party

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bar manager Josh presents the third dinner party in south-east London, and hopes to wow his guests with a menu inspired by beer. However, they may not be too impressed to find their host's favourite tipple featuring in every course. Josh also cuts corners in the kitchen and tries to hide the fact he has had part of his main meal delivered

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Texan psychologist David hosts the fourth night of the competition in south-east London, and takes inspiration from his passion for Mexican food. However, his guests are surprised by his love of spice, and his elaborate entertainment and controversial conversations make it a party to remember

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition in south-east London it is part-time event organiser Gina's turn to throw a dinner party. She rolls out an evening of fine dining inspired by her love of cookery courses, but her culinary prowess fails to make an impact on Vincenzo, as he reveals he already ate dinner at home due to his belief that women can't cook. Meanwhile, Leah reveals a surprising beauty secret from her youth during the main course, before a self-penned poem from the host brings tears to David's eyes, and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Grace and Conor host the week's first visit at The White Lion near Crewe, where value is at the heart of their business. And it's that bang for their buck that has the B&Bers waxing lyrical - apart from one, who's gives the hosts a grilling over their breakfast options in the feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Laura and Claudia welcome the B&Bers to Foxlow Grange in Buxton, Derbyshire, where they're wowed by the interior design. But bathroom problems besiege Sue's stay, while two guests feel worryingly exposed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Carmarthenshire, where hosts Eirlys and Demelza take pride in the character of their self-catering cottages. The competitive spirit of all the guests is on show during a trip to a farm, and accusations of tactics start flying

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sue and Roger host the final visit of the week to Tedstone Log Cabins in Herefordshire. Everyone agrees the hand-crafted huts are charming, but there are immediate questions about the value for money. Roger is left reeling by some comments in their feedback, leaving him ready for a battle on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: After a particularly competitive week with plenty of gripes about value for money, the four sets of owners meet for one last time to learn who has won the best value B&B of the week. They soon discover what the other competitors think of their businesses by opening the cash-filled envelopes that contain what their rivals believe their hosts should receive

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, a 35-year-old long-term resident at a neurological hospital, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe, and his devoted parents are with him as doctors attempt to get to the bottom of his symptoms. Three-year-old Thomas is brought in with a high temperature by his parents, who are concerned as he was born with an extremely rare blood condition that meant he needed a full blood exchange when he was less than 24 hours old

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow 56-year-old Dave, who is brought to St George's after falling from a ladder at work. Doctors are concerned that he may have life-changing damage to his spine. Meanwhile, three-year-old Alf arrives in resus with his parents after being hit by a car

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at the entrance to a block of flats, but manages to call for help before collapsing. A young man has had 13 seizures in one day and needs urgent medical care. While treating a patient, the paramedics discover that he has allegedly assaulted someone else, and now have two patients on their hands. Plus, a taxi driver has a woman who is having a seizure in the back of his cab

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. Nurse Christine battles to clear her airway, while Maureen's husband Preston waits in the relatives' room. As doctors carry out further investigations, Preston joins Maureen and it's revealed how their world was turned upside down when Maureen was diagnosed with the neurological condition multiple system atrophy. Ten-year-old Ryan is brought into resus having fallen at school and suffered internal bleeding

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Mark, a 35-year-old long-term resident at a neurological hospital, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe, and his devoted parents are with him as doctors attempt to get to the bottom of his symptoms. Three-year-old Thomas is brought in with a high temperature by his parents, who are concerned as he was born with an extremely rare blood condition that meant he needed a full blood exchange when he was less than 24 hours old

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Motorhome enthusiasts explore Britain's luxury campsites. In North Yorkshire, campers indulge in some welly-wanging and take to the high seas on a pirate ship

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dry-cleaning manager Valerie hosts the first dinner party in Lancashire, where she plans to impress her guests with a lamb hotpot and trifle. However, it remains to be seen whether her warm-hearted hospitality will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize by the end of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dance teacher Nicky hosts the second night in Lancashire, where she hopes to impress her guests with a round-the-world themed menu inspired by her dancing tours, which includes a Chinese salmon starter, and an American dessert. However, with fellow contestant Peggy born in the United States, the host may have her work cut out in presenting the perfect dish

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outsourcing manager Steve hosts the third night in Lancashire, where the 51-year-old plans to wow his guests with a 'man of the world' menu that relies heavily on strong Indian spices. Peggy picks him up on his shop-bought black pudding, while Nicky is unimpressed by the mildness of the chicken balti, resulting in a humiliating chilli-sauce challenge

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: American Peggy hosts a USA-themed dinner party on the fourth night of the competition in Lancashire, and hopes her Arizonan recipes will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize. Her menu comprises tried and tested dishes, including her dessert of peach dump cake. However, friction between her and fellow contestant Steve continues to build

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party in Lancashire, and the turn of sales manager Andy to host. He is confident in his locally sourced gastro menu and delivers a meal with plenty of flair, but faces the challenge of impressing foodie Nicky. He is also under pressure to convince American Peggy of the merits of the region's food, while his fellow Lancastrians Valerie and Steve are keen to see how the area has influenced his cooking

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps newlyweds Des and Julie find their dream permanent home in the town of Oliva in the Spanish region of Valencia. With a budget of £105,000, they're hoping to buy their first property together, with at least three bedrooms for their big extended family. Will any of the properties that Ben shows them prove to be their perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe goes house-hunting in Mijas Pueblo on Spain's Costa del Sol with Alistair and Jennifer from Milton Keynes. They first visited the area 20 years ago and have spent many happy holidays there since. Now, with a maximum budget of £225,000, they want to find their very own holiday home with enough room for all the family

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Julie and Derek look for their dream home in Tarbes at the foothills of the Pyrenees in southern France. The couple are looking for a two-bedroom house with the 'shabby-chic' style they love and a good amount of land for Julie to start an alpaca walking business on a budget of £130,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Nilesh and Raakhee in Maidenhead to help them decide whether to love and renovate their home or list it for sale. The couple moved into their four-bedroom house two years ago but since their child was born a year ago, the small shut-off kitchen has become a big issue and Nilesh would like to be closer to family in Leicestershire but Raakhee believes that with a bit of love, care and fixing-up it could be their forever home

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps more people make their period homes fit for modern life. On a cobbled street in Cheshire sits a Georgian town house that could be straight out of a Dickens novel. It may look very 18th-century on the outside, but inside George discovers that it's a 1980s horror show, having been stripped of its original features. It does have one unique feature, though - a first-floor conservatory on stilts. Can he find a way of getting its grandeur back? George also has his work cut out tackling a 380-year-old Jacobean cottage

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bill and Sandra like the idea of a holiday home in Kapparis, eastern Cyprus, so Jasmine Harman tries to find them an apartment with a sea view for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson goes house-hunting around the coastal town of Olbia on Sardinia with outdoor sports enthusiasts Katrina and Colin. They've been coming to the island for 18 years and would ideally love a holiday home big enough for them and their three grown-up children to enjoy. With a budget of £135,000, they're hoping Jean can find them perfection, and she's ready for action lining up five great options for the pair to consider

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hosts Andrew and Diane are professional artists who've designed their establishment using all of their creative prowess, and the eclectic accommodation options are an immediate hit. But one guest thinks the facilities are lacking, and leaves some comments in their feedback that are difficult for the hosts to brush off

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mubi and Steve focus on fun and wellness at their place in Portsmouth, Ashby's Accommodation. The luxury lodgings go down brilliantly - until one guest happens across some maintenance mishaps. At least a trip up a famous tower seems to leave everyone in high spirits

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Bosham B&B in West Sussex. Alicia runs the business from her own home, where she applies some extra homely touches for her guests' comfort. Unfortunately, the relaxed mood is pierced during evening drinks by an argument about online reviews

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to Marc and Matt's gastropub in Kent, The Dog at Wingham. The pair have raised the B&Bers' expectations throughout the week, and at first glance it seems they were right to do so. However, one visitor thinks they've got a 'ruff' deal with their room. The Dog is renowned for its food, so it's hoped a perfect breakfast will put Marc and Matt onto a winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: One guest's pernickety protests about a path prove pivotal in providing a plaque-winner as the B&B owners reconvene for payment day

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Kain and David check for life-changing spinal injuries in a 62-year-old woman who's been thrown off her horse. Dr Jonathan and nurse Lucy detect a ticking time bomb in a woman who's been rushed in from the airport after she collapsed on a long-haul flight from the UK, but the life-saving medication she needs carries extra dangers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Exploring the hopes and expectations of three different men and how they respond to changes that are beyond their control. They include Stanlie, 24, who is airlifted to St George's by helicopter paramedics after being impaled on a metal rod at a construction site

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow patients at south-west London's St George's hospital on Harry and Meghan's wedding day in May 2018. As the happy couple tie the knot, patients and their relatives reflect on the meaning of lifelong love, devotion and commitment. Among those treated are David, 74, who is flown to St George's by air ambulance after falling from a ladder. Medics suspect internal bleeding and he is rushed to CT to assess the damage. His wife Lynda makes her way to the hospital as doctors try to prevent catastrophic blood loss

programme.desc: The camping enthusiasts' tour of North Yorkshire brings them to The Hideaway, a tranquil eco-friendly site at Baxby Manor, where they learn to forage for food and take to the skies

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Motorhome enthusiasts explore Britain's luxury campsites. In North Yorkshire, campers indulge in some welly-wanging and take to the high seas on a pirate ship

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dry-cleaning manager Valerie hosts the first dinner party in Lancashire, where she plans to impress her guests with a lamb hotpot and trifle. However, it remains to be seen whether her warm-hearted hospitality will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize by the end of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dance teacher Nicky hosts the second night in Lancashire, where she hopes to impress her guests with a round-the-world themed menu inspired by her dancing tours, which includes a Chinese salmon starter, and an American dessert. However, with fellow contestant Peggy born in the United States, the host may have her work cut out in presenting the perfect dish

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outsourcing manager Steve hosts the third night in Lancashire, where the 51-year-old plans to wow his guests with a 'man of the world' menu that relies heavily on strong Indian spices. Peggy picks him up on his shop-bought black pudding, while Nicky is unimpressed by the mildness of the chicken balti, resulting in a humiliating chilli-sauce challenge

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: American Peggy hosts a USA-themed dinner party on the fourth night of the competition in Lancashire, and hopes her Arizonan recipes will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize. Her menu comprises tried and tested dishes, including her dessert of peach dump cake. However, friction between her and fellow contestant Steve continues to build

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party in Lancashire, and the turn of sales manager Andy to host. He is confident in his locally sourced gastro menu and delivers a meal with plenty of flair, but faces the challenge of impressing foodie Nicky. He is also under pressure to convince American Peggy of the merits of the region's food, while his fellow Lancastrians Valerie and Steve are keen to see how the area has influenced his cooking

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps newlyweds Des and Julie find their dream permanent home in the town of Oliva in the Spanish region of Valencia. With a budget of £105,000, they're hoping to buy their first property together, with at least three bedrooms for their big extended family. Will any of the properties that Ben shows them prove to be their perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe goes house-hunting in Mijas Pueblo on Spain's Costa del Sol with Alistair and Jennifer from Milton Keynes. They first visited the area 20 years ago and have spent many happy holidays there since. Now, with a maximum budget of £225,000, they want to find their very own holiday home with enough room for all the family

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Julie and Derek look for their dream home in Tarbes at the foothills of the Pyrenees in southern France. The couple are looking for a two-bedroom house with the 'shabby-chic' style they love and a good amount of land for Julie to start an alpaca walking business on a budget of £130,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Nilesh and Raakhee in Maidenhead to help them decide whether to love and renovate their home or list it for sale. The couple moved into their four-bedroom house two years ago but since their child was born a year ago, the small shut-off kitchen has become a big issue and Nilesh would like to be closer to family in Leicestershire but Raakhee believes that with a bit of love, care and fixing-up it could be their forever home

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps more people make their period homes fit for modern life. On a cobbled street in Cheshire sits a Georgian town house that could be straight out of a Dickens novel. It may look very 18th-century on the outside, but inside George discovers that it's a 1980s horror show, having been stripped of its original features. It does have one unique feature, though - a first-floor conservatory on stilts. Can he find a way of getting its grandeur back? George also has his work cut out tackling a 380-year-old Jacobean cottage

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bill and Sandra like the idea of a holiday home in Kapparis, eastern Cyprus, so Jasmine Harman tries to find them an apartment with a sea view for their £80,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Rum & Revolution: History of Havana
programme.desc: In the 1950s, Havana shines as a vibrant metropolis - alive with music, casinos, and cabarets. However, beneath the allure lies a city controlled by the American mafia, where luxury contrasts sharply with the poverty endured by most Cubans. American tourists escape Prohibition and moral restrictions back home. Icons like Ernest Hemingway, Frank Sinatra, and Ava Gardner revel in the city?s rhythms, frequenting hotspots like the Hotel Nacional and the Tropicana nightclub. Yet beneath the surface, corruption and oppression grip Cuba

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIII's second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A network of tunnels built by George IV underneath Brighton's Royal Pavilion as he had grown so fat that he was embarrassed by his appearance and wanted to visit his beloved horses unobserved by cruel critics. Plus, the story behind the Diana, Princess of Wales statue in Kensington Palace and how this piece of art ended up demonstrating the fractured relationship of her two sons

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of Kensington Palace, which is currently the official London residence of the Duke and Duchess of Gloucester, the Duke and Duchess of Kent, and Prince and Princess Michael of Kent. Kate Williams also tells the tale of Elizabeth I's make-up, which was so poisonous that it would be illegal today, with her foundation made of lead and vinegar, her rouge from lead carbonate, and her lipstick from ground alabaster, with side-effects including digestive problems and respiratory issues

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A look at the lost palace of Whitehall, which was destroyed by fire in 1698, with the Banqueting House the sole surviving building from the complex. Plus, the story of a couple from Manchester who decided to invite the Queen to their wedding in 2012, while Kate Williams explores the narcissistic motivations behind the Field of the Cloth of Gold, one of the biggest Tudor parties in history

programme.title: Secrets of the Royal Palaces
programme.desc: A look at the development of Buckingham Palace over the past 100 years, and the hidden messages in the gold dress worn by the Duchess of Cambridge at the premiere of James Bond film No Time to Die. programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.sub-title: And I Will Make Them One Nation
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines the history of the Stuarts, who grappled with the chaos of three separate kingdoms, multiple religions and civil war during the 17th century. In the opening episode, she looks at James VI of Scotland's attempts to unite his country with England and Ireland and persuade his subjects to feel more British

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: After Charles I's disastrous attempt to impose political and religious uniformity throughout England, Scotland and Ireland, both the Stuart dynasty and its three kingdoms fell into an abyss. In this episode, Dr Clare Jackson reveals how the unprecedented religious violence of the Wars of the Three Kingdoms shaped British political culture and subsequent constitutional crises

programme.title: The Stuarts
programme.desc: Clare Jackson examines how the Stuarts became fatally divided by religion, with brothers in opposition and two daughters supporting the overthrow of their father. After the Catholic James II was deposed by the Protestant William of Orange in 1688, Scotland lost its sovereignty and became part of Great Britain in 1707, while Ireland was reduced from a kingdom to a colony

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn

programme.title: Legends and Luxury - History of Marrakesh
programme.desc: A journey through the history of the city of Marrakesh, Morocco, its rich heritage and enduring cultural legacy. programme.title: Mary Beard's Ultimate Rome: Empire Without Limit
programme.desc: English Classical scholar Mary Beard explores the myths and revolutions of the Roman Empire, looking at it with an epic scope, and gives her own personal take on the world-defining period. In the first edition, she gains an insight into the deep-rooted psyche of the people of Rome, looks at the expansion of the city, and travels to Greece, where Rome adopted a complex mix of brute force and cultural cringe, and France, where she finds evidence of war methods akin to genocide

programme.title: Mary Beard's Ultimate Rome: Empire Without Limit
programme.desc: English Classical scholar Mary Beard explores the physical world of the Roman Empire, finding surprising parallels with our own world. She discovers a vast empire bound together by a common material culture, and a globalised economy of such scale that evidence of its side-effects can still be seen today. As Mary examines a huge commercial and cultural network, she takes in the vital supply of olive oil to Rome, the slave trade, and the silver mines of Spain. Following the famous Roman road network, the presenter also reveals another side to the Roman Empire, where builders and traders eclipse soldiers, and slaves make the most of a hugely connected new world

programme.title: Mary Beard's Ultimate Rome: Empire Without Limit
programme.desc: Scholar Mary Beard takes an in-depth look at identity and citizenship within the Roman Empire, including what it meant to be, or become, Roman, and how the different parts of the Empire reacted to Roman rule. She follows the story of an African Roman from his native land to Britain, where he served as a governor, and in York and Newcastle she finds the remains of Romans, but not as one might imagine

programme.title: Mary Beard's Ultimate Rome: Empire Without Limit
programme.desc: Scholar Mary Beard tackles one of the biggest puzzles of all as she examines how and when the Roman Empire fell, surveying the walls and fortifications of Britain and Germany. She seeks to redefine understanding of so-called 'Barbarian Invasions', before ultimately asking whether the Empire was transformed rather than destroyed, and still lives on in the world today

programme.title: Weathered: Earth's Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May visits the Isle de Jean Charles, Louisiana, one of the first communities in the United States to undergo a federally funded relocation due to climate change. She also learns about hurricanes from the Hurricane Hunters

programme.title: Rum & Revolution: History of Havana
programme.desc: In the 1950s, Havana shines as a vibrant metropolis - alive with music, casinos, and cabarets. However, beneath the allure lies a city controlled by the American mafia, where luxury contrasts sharply with the poverty endured by most Cubans. American tourists escape Prohibition and moral restrictions back home. Icons like Ernest Hemingway, Frank Sinatra, and Ava Gardner revel in the city?s rhythms, frequenting hotspots like the Hotel Nacional and the Tropicana nightclub. Yet beneath the surface, corruption and oppression grip Cuba

programme.title: Legends and Luxury - History of Marrakesh
programme.desc: A journey through the history of the city of Marrakesh, Morocco, its rich heritage and enduring cultural legacy. Plus, how the city has captivated Western elites, including Winston Churchill, Alfred Hitchcock and The Rolling Stones, throughout history with its almost mystical allure

programme.title: Mary Beard's Ultimate Rome: Empire Without Limit
programme.desc: English Classical scholar Mary Beard explores the myths and revolutions of the Roman Empire, looking at it with an epic scope, and gives her own personal take on the world-defining period. programme.title: Lost Cities of Rome
programme.desc: Rome created the largest empire in the ancient world - its armies, organisation and building innovation created a vast territory linked by roads. Many of these cities lie in ruins today, others are buried and many others are forgotten. As this documentary reveals, they include Leptis Magna, Volubilis, Tipasa and Timgad in North Africa and Baalbek, Jerash, Palmyra and Apamea in the Middle East

programme.title: Rise of the Freemen
programme.desc: Using FBI footage to highlight the escalating threat, violent actions and dramatic undercover arrests of the Montana Freemen, a heavily armed Christian Patriot militia who in 1996 engaged in an 81-day stand-off with federal agents

programme.title: The Rosenbergs: Atomic Spies
programme.desc: How, in 1950 with America in the throes of the Red Scare, seemingly ordinary couple Julius and Ethel Rosenberg found themselves the target of anti-Communist hysteria. Arrested by the FBI and accused of passing secret information to the USSR, they maintained their innocence while the media and public opinion seemed to condemned them. Their trial did nothing to change this and ended in a death sentence. Thirty years later, declassified files revealed that Ethel was not a spy, though Julius did commit espionage - primarily as a recruiter. Using archival footage, this documentary revisits the intriguing case

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Alex and his son Flynn bring in their cherished stuffed toy lamb for the attention of soft toy specialists Amanda Middleditch and Julie Tatchell. The toy was given to Alex when he was just four months old and after a lifetime of cuddling it has lost an eye, an ear and is less squishy than they would like. Next in is Alejandro with his Great Grandmother's breadcrumb maker that is over 100-years-old and has been passed through generations of his family. programme.desc: Dominic Chinea and Lucia Scalisi are in Dundee, where regeneration of the waterfront has sparked change throughout the city. Chief Inspector Benson questions his innocence, and although the vicar leaps to his friend's defence, no one can verify his whereabouts when Eddie was killed. programme.sub-title: Queen - A Night at the Opera
programme.desc: The story behind the conception and recording of Queen's fourth album A Night at the Opera, which was released in 1975. Containing songs such as You're My Best Friend and Bohemian Rhapsody, the record transformed the group's career. The programme features interviews, acoustic performances and archive footage

programme.title: Queen: Live at the Rainbow
programme.desc: A 1974 concert by the rock band at London's Rainbow Theatre, featuring performances of Killer Queen and Seven Seas of Rhye

programme.title: Queen: Greatest Video Hits 1
programme.desc: A compilation of the band's promos from 1973 to 1981, featuring the videos for Bohemian Rhapsody, You're My Best Friend, Killer Queen, Bicycle Race and more

programme.title: Queen: Greatest Video Hits 2
programme.desc: A collection of the band's promos from 1982 onwards, featuring the videos for Radio Ga Ga, I Want to Break Free, Under Pressure and more

programme.title: Queen: From Rags to Rhapsody
programme.desc: Documentary recalling the rock band's early years, spent struggling gigging at pubs and colleges, and following their progress up to the moment they captured the UK's hearts and minds with what was to become one of the greatest songs of all time - Bohemian Rhapsody. The documentary features contributions by band members and outtakes from recording sessions

programme.title: Greatest Guitar Riffs
programme.desc: Leading guitarists talk about their most recognisable work, beginning with Tony Iommi of Black Sabbath revealing how he created the riffs that changed rock for ever, while Queen's Brian May joins him at his home studio for a jam

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: With a helping hand from the likes of Mavis Staples, Janis Joplin and Chaka Khan, this documentary takes a trip to the 1950s and 60s to the roots of rock 'n' roll

programme.title: The Great Songwriters
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which artists talk about their work and perform a selection of tracks, beginning with Tom Odell. He discusses his songwriting and life in music, and plays songs including Another Love and Grow Old with Me

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Music critics and fans look back at the career of the rock band, famed for their hugely concept albums and elaborate live shows

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Music critics reflect on the life and career of the former Faces frontman, one of the best-selling artists of all time

programme.title: André Rieu
programme.sub-title: André Rieu Royale: Coronation Concert Live in Amsterdam
programme.desc: The Dutch violinist performs songs including a specially penned Coronation Waltz at the investiture of King Willem-Alexander on April 30, 2013

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman discovers the disturbing secret of an archaeologist able to immediately date relics with unerring accuracy

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man on holiday in the West Indies become involved in a bizarre bet with a stranger. Starring Pamela Stephenson, Jose Ferrer and Michael Ontkean

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: Mrs Bixby and the Colonel's Coat
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife receives a mink coat from her lover - and must explain the gift to her husband's satisfaction. Starring Richard Greene, Julie Harris and Michael Hordern

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: By persuading a surgeon to perform a macabre experiment, a man continues to dominate his wife after his death. Elaine Stritch and Marius Goring star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When her policeman husband Patrick callously announces that he is leaving her, Mary Marney strikes out and kills him with the frozen leg of lamb she has bought for their dinner. When attending the scene, officers are unable to determine nor find the murder weapon. Susan George and Brian Blessed star

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A 17-year-old British girl is inadvertently driven to Mexico by a dangerous car thief who is unaware she is sleeping in the back seat

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After a boy drowns, a strange woman claims to be the child's birth mother and proceeds to blackmail the adoptive mother

programme.title: Simon & Garfunkel: Old Friends - Live on Stage
programme.desc: A 2003 concert by the duo at Madison Square Garden in New York City, featuring a guest appearance by the Everly Brothers

programme.title: Johnny Cash Live at Montreux
programme.desc: A performance by the singer at the 1994 jazz festival, featuring 19 of his classic songs and an appearance by wife June Carter Cash

programme.title: California Dreamin': The Songs of the Mamas and the Papas
programme.desc: Documentary charting the success of the Californian pop group, featuring performance, archive footage and interviews with the band members. Denny Doherty, Cass Elliot, John Phillips and Michelle Phillips provide accounts of the writing and recording process involved in the creation of their hit songs and how they personally dealt with instant fame and success

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Pale Horse
programme.desc: A sculptor discovers a dying priest who gives him a list of names. Investigations lead the man to the Pale Horse coaching inn, the home of three modern-day witches - who may be using their occult skills to murder the people on the list by auto suggestion. Mystery, starring Colin Buchanan, Jayne Ashbourne and Hermione Norris

programme.title: Bee Gees: One Night Only
programme.desc: Barry, Robin and Maurice Gibb perform their greatest hits, such as Jive Talkin', How Deep Is Your Love and Stayin' Alive, in a concert at the MGM Grand, Las Vegas, in 1997. They are joined by Celine Dion on the track Immortality, and also sing some of the music they wrote but which was made popular by other artists, including Islands in the Stream, Guilty and Heartbreaker

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song by Song
programme.desc: The Country and Western singer reflects on her Oscar-nominated song 9 to 5 and the challenges of acting in Hollywood. With contributions by Lily Tomlin and Miley Cyrus

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Song by Song
programme.desc: The singer looks back at her most famous songs, reflecting on the conservative backlash to her hit Travelin' Thru, how she came to be seen as a gay activist and her transition from country to pop

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Scotty McCreery, Justin Moore, Sara Evans, Old Crow Medicine Show
programme.desc: Scotty McCreery, Justin Moore, Sara Evans and Old Crow Medicine Show perform at world-famous Nashville music venue the Grand Ole Opry

programme.title: My Favorite Things: The Rodgers & Hammerstein 80th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: A celebration of the partnership of Richard Rodgers and Oscar Hammerstein II at the Theatre Royal Drury Lane, with songs from Oklahoma!, Carousel, South Pacific, The King and I, Cinderella and The Sound of Music. Featuring performances by Joanna Ampil, Michael Ball, Maria Friedman, Daniel Dae Kim, Audra McDonald, Julian Ovenden, Lucy St Louis, Aaron Tveit, Marisha Wallace and Patrick Wilson

programme.title: God Bless Ozzy Osbourne
programme.desc: A profile of Black Sabbath member Ozzy Osbourne, from the wild and hedonistic days that adversely affected his personal life, through the years of depression, alcoholism and drug dependency that followed. The programme also reveals how he overcame his demons, with the help of his second wife Sharon. Featuring interviews with Paul McCartney, Motley Crue drummer Tommy Lee and others

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The making of Motorhead's album Ace of Spades, which combined rock 'n' roll influences with thrash metal and became the group's best-known release. Featuring interviews with Lemmy, Phil Taylor and former member Fast Eddie Clarke, along with fans such as Metallica's Lars Ulrich and guitarist Slash

programme.title: The Great Songwriters
programme.desc: Mike Scott of the Waterboys talks about his life in music and performs a selection of tracks

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life and career of the guitarist, who is the only musician to have been inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame three times - as a solo act and as a member of the Yardbirds and Cream

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Music critics discuss the lives and careers of the members of the American rock band, best-known for their song Hotel California

programme.title: Cirque du Soleil: Volta
programme.desc: A production by the circus troupe based on extreme sports

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a forest scene on black canvas, featuring tall, majestic trees, puddles and fresh air

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a scene depicting a trail covered in fresh snow, surrounded by warm colours and fuzzy trees

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man on holiday in the West Indies become involved in a bizarre bet with a stranger. Starring Pamela Stephenson, Jose Ferrer and Michael Ontkean

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: After scaling back his role in the FBI and still reeling from a family tragedy, Special Agent Tom Brandis reluctantly returns to the field to head a new, relatively inexperienced team to investigate a string of robberies in Philadelphia. Following his brother's death, Robbie Prendergrast earns extra cash for his family by ripping off drug dealers - but a bad tip upends his delicate balance. Crime drama, starring Mark Ruffalo

programme.title: Task
programme.sub-title: Out Beyond Ideas of Wrongdoing and Rightdoing, There Is a River
programme.desc: The task force, Dark Hearts and Robbie converge in the woods, leading to a dramatic showdown with far-reaching consequences for all involved. In the aftermath, Tom turns his attention back to his now fragmented team as the FBI launches an investigation

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the wake of the showdown, the members of the now-disbanded Task Force continue to seek answers. As the Dark Hearts mobilise to cover their tracks, a shocking revelation leads them to a final confrontation

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: On Pembleton's first case back, he looks into a divorced woman who is found stabbed to death and her 10-year-old twin boys shot in the head

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slade's preconceptions are challenged when a gay men's choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberland's Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Teenager Logan starts work as an apprentice deck-hand, while landlady Pat recalls fond memories from her life in Brixham

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Fish merchant Robert and his wife Kelly decide to open a seafood restaurant in Brixham - but their determinedly contemporary approach to cuisine leaves some locals unimpressed. The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Swearengen strikes a departure deal with Miss Isringhausen and orders Farnum to befriend Blasanov so he can monitor any telegrams coming in from Yankton. Bullock gains possession of a safe full of money, while Hostetler and the General acquire a valuable wild horse they hope to sell to the cavalry. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The town is left reeling in the wake of William's accident, and Hostetler and the General flee in fear of retribution once word gets out that the horse was in their care. Meanwhile, Swearengen finally receives word from Yankton. Drama, starring Ian McShane, Brad Dourif and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: The residents of Deadwood face a sad day when William's funeral is held, and Seth Bullock and his wife prepare to leave the town following their son's tragic death. Meanwhile, Alma offers her answer to Ellsworth. Timothy Olyphant and Anna Gunn star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her son's murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegon's Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma D'Arcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemon's loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyra's absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In King's Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegon's fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma D'Arcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegon's council, while Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal. Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemon's unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma D'Arcy

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.desc: Psychological warfare begins as Lindy becomes convinced that Les will never find a way to make her big again. When Jackie strikes a deal to give Lindy the credit for her short story, Lulu discovers how the internet can turn someone from hero to villain

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: While Ava pitches her reboot to the network, Deborah does her final press ahead of her Madison Square Garden show

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clark's trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: In Marrakesh, Max and JJ prepare for the uranium exchange with the cartel, all under the watchful eye of Cassie

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: As he prepares for an emotional court appearance, Tom buries himself in the case, while Emily questions her obligations to the family. Maeve makes a critical choice to protect her own loved ones, while Robbie works to find a way to turn his newfound surplus into cash

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: As Robbie and Cliff try to find a potential buyer, Tom and Grasso level with the Dark Hearts, and Aleah and Lizzie question Peaches' former co-workers. Later, a raid leads Tom to a shocking revelation

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the midst of preparing for a key operation, Tom questions the loyalty of the members of his task force, while Robbie and Cliff plan for their meeting at the park. Perry searches for answers within the gang and uncovers a shocking truth and Maeve casts doubt on Robbie's exit plan

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: The tension between Aqsa and Sabi comes to a head. Meanwhile, Paul confesses some truths to Sabi and Aqsa drops a huge bomb

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberland's Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixham's annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. Landlady Pat Seddon is not looking forward to the raucous celebrations, however, and decides to reminisce about past race days instead. The programme also meets Matt Kimble, a graduate who gave up on his plan to become a PE teacher and decided to follow his ancestors into the fishing trade instead

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham relives its glory days by hosting a vintage ships race and heritage festival, and a local toy-shop owner faces a difficult decision

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe negotiates with a reluctant seller and Wendy makes a professional decision that adds further conflict to her relationship with Chuck

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe assembles a war room in the Hamptons following a disastrous setback, and seeks counsel on how to recoup his losses. Drama, starring Damian Lewis

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.sub-title: When You're Lost in the Darkness
programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellie's fate while navigating the ruins of Boston on their way to drop the teenager off with a group of Fireflies

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: When a stranger approaches his compound, survivalist Bill forges an unlikely connection. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey, with Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie continue with their journey to Wyoming, but end up drawing the attention of a vindictive rebel leader while driving through Kansas City

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: While attempting to evade the rebels, Joel and Ellie cross paths with the most wanted man in Kansas City. Kathleen continues her hunt

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After ignoring the advice of locals, Joel and Ellie descend deeper into dangerous territory in search of the Fireflies - and Tommy. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As Joel fights to survive, Ellie looks back on the night that changed everything. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Ellie crosses paths with a vengeful group of survivors and draws the attention of the leader, while a weakened Joel faces a new threat. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie near the end of their journey, while a flashback reveals a woman placing her trust in a lifelong friend. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Amber reunites with her family while Tibor faces his estranged mother, while Olly rejects their plan and contacts the National Crime Unit, leading Pegasus straight to them

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue makes a deal with the devil in the form of a promise to Alamo, and gives a word of warning to Maddy. Cassie gets her first real taste of stardom on the set of LA Nights, and Rue paints Jules a picture of her ideal future

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As the Waystar team discusses a pivotal recommendation to the board, Roman, Kendall and Shiv navigate a misstep with Matsson. Jeremy Strong, Sarah Snook and Kieran Culkin star

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: Tom and his team inch closer to breaking the case with help from an eyewitness, while Perry pays Maeve a visit and Robbie puts his plan in motion. Later, Tom follows a lead that takes him down a dangerous path

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A robbery gone wrong leads to the death of Danver's bride-to-be while trying on a wedding dress. Once again, Pembleton and Bayliss disagree on theories of the crime

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: After a night together, Ilya lets his guard down, sending Shane into a panic. Shane's relationship with a movie star intensifies the turmoil between them. Drama starring Hudson Williams and Connor Storrie about two ice-hockey players whose on-ice animosity conceals a secret romance between the two

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: With the help of Sabi and friends, Aqsa and Izzy sort of take the next step. Paul and Bessy reconnect over a shared experience.

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Paul's Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddon's plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixham's Crab Festival

programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellie's fate while navigating the ruins of Boston on their way to drop the teenager off with a group of Fireflies

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: When a stranger approaches his compound, survivalist Bill forges an unlikely connection. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey, with Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie continue with their journey to Wyoming, but end up drawing the attention of a vindictive rebel leader while driving through Kansas City

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: While attempting to evade the rebels, Joel and Ellie cross paths with the most wanted man in Kansas City. Kathleen continues her hunt

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After ignoring the advice of locals, Joel and Ellie descend deeper into dangerous territory in search of the Fireflies - and Tommy. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: As Joel fights to survive, Ellie looks back on the night that changed everything. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Ellie crosses paths with a vengeful group of survivors and draws the attention of the leader, while a weakened Joel faces a new threat. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie near the end of their journey, while a flashback reveals a woman placing her trust in a lifelong friend. Drama, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Amber reunites with her family while Tibor faces his estranged mother, while Olly rejects their plan and contacts the National Crime Unit, leading Pegasus straight to them

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue makes a deal with the devil in the form of a promise to Alamo, and gives a word of warning to Maddy. Cassie gets her first real taste of stardom on the set of LA Nights, and Rue paints Jules a picture of her ideal future

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: In Marrakesh, Max and JJ prepare for the uranium exchange with the cartel, all under the watchful eye of Cassie

programme.title: Task
programme.sub-title: Out Beyond Ideas of Wrongdoing and Rightdoing, There Is a River
programme.desc: The task force, Dark Hearts and Robbie converge in the woods, leading to a dramatic showdown with far-reaching consequences for all involved. In the aftermath, Tom turns his attention back to his now fragmented team as the FBI launches an investigation

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A robbery gone wrong leads to the death of Danver's bride-to-be while trying on a wedding dress. Once again, Pembleton and Bayliss disagree on theories of the crime

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya, Jacob Elordi and Sydney Sweeney

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: After a night together, Ilya lets his guard down, sending Shane into a panic. Shane's relationship with a movie star intensifies the turmoil between them. Drama starring Hudson Williams and Connor Storrie about two ice-hockey players whose on-ice animosity conceals a secret romance between the two

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: With the help of Sabi and friends, Aqsa and Izzy sort of take the next step. Paul and Bessy reconnect over a shared experience.

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Paul's Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddon's plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixham's Crab Festival

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: As Momodu Gondo finds himself in an interrogation, a detective traces a string of overdoses to Baltimore. Crime drama, starring Jon Bernthal

programme.title: The Chronicles of Riddick (2004)
programme.desc: Fugitive Riddick evades capture by bounty hunters and steals their spacecraft, only to run into an even bigger threat - fanatical cult members on a sinister mission to kill or convert anyone who crosses their path as they seek galactic domination. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Vin Diesel reprising his role from Pitch Black alongside Judi Dench, Alexa Davalos and Thandwie Newton.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor (2008)
programme.desc: Daredevil explorers Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are called into action when their son accidentally resurrects the evil Chinese Emperor Han from his ancient tomb. The family now faces a race against time to prevent the merciless leader from awakening his vast terracotta army in a plot to take over the world. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello, Jet Li and Michelle Yeoh.

Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Vin Diesel reprising his role from Pitch Black alongside Judi Dench, Alexa Davalos and Thandwie Newton.

programme.title: Troy (2004)
programme.desc: A Trojan prince elopes with the king of Sparta's wife, sparking a bitter and bloody war between a mighty alliance of Greek kings and the city of Troy, whose champion engages in intense personal conflict with the enemy's most formidable warrior. Wolfgang Petersen's adventure, inspired by Homer's epic poem The Iliad, with Brad Pitt, Eric Bana, Orlando Bloom, Brian Cox, Sean Bean and Peter O'Toole

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor (2008)
programme.desc: Daredevil explorers Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are called into action when their son accidentally resurrects the evil Chinese Emperor Han from his ancient tomb. The family now faces a race against time to prevent the merciless leader from awakening his vast terracotta army in a plot to take over the world. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello, Jet Li and Michelle Yeoh.

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging hero's darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncle's murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his father's villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm (2005)
programme.desc: Travelling conmen Wilhelm and Jacob Grimm convince naive country folk that demons are making mischief in their villages - and then charge the gullible yokels for getting rid of the phoney beasts. However, their scam catches up with them when they are tasked to find some missing children by a local governor - leading to an encounter with a real witch in an enchanted wood. Terry Gilliam's period fantasy adventure, with Heath Ledger, Matt Damon, Jonathan Pryce and Monica Bellucci

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm (2005)
programme.desc: Travelling conmen Wilhelm and Jacob Grimm convince naive country folk that demons are making mischief in their villages - and then charge the gullible yokels for getting rid of the phoney beasts. However, their scam catches up with them when they are tasked to find some missing children by a local governor - leading to an encounter with a real witch in an enchanted wood. Terry Gilliam's period fantasy adventure, with Heath Ledger, Matt Damon, Jonathan Pryce and Monica Bellucci

programme.title: The Italian Job (2003)
programme.desc: A crook double-crosses his partners in crime, a betrayal that leaves their friend and mentor dead. One year later, they regroup and come up with a daring plan to exact revenge on the traitor and reclaim their ill-gotten gains. Crime thriller inspired by the 1969 movie, starring Mark Wahlberg, Charlize Theron, Edward Norton, Seth Green and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barrie's fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven (2001)
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegas's biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderbergh's crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac

programme.title: Ocean's Twelve (2004)
programme.desc: The crooks reunite when an old enemy catches up with them and demands they repay the money they stole from him three years previously. In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle

programme.title: Ocean's Thirteen (2007)
programme.desc: Danny Ocean rounds up his band of crooks for one last heist. Gang member Reuben has been left traumatised and in a coma after being double-crossed by crooked casino owner Willy Bank, and Danny decides that payback is in order. He plans a scheme that will leave Bank penniless, but needs the help of an old enemy. Comedy crime caper sequel, with George Clooney, Al Pacino, Brad Pitt, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia, Don Cheadle and Elliott Gould

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai (2018)
programme.desc: In 2008, at the Taj Mahal Palace Hotel, four terrorists take the staff and residents hostage. However, some of the employees risk their lives to protect their guests. Writer/director Anthony Maras's fact-based thriller, starring Dev Patel, Armie Hammer and Jason Isaacs

programme.title: The Italian Job (2003)
programme.desc: A crook double-crosses his partners in crime, a betrayal that leaves their friend and mentor dead. programme.title: The Cinema List: Unmissable Sky Originals
programme.desc: Dive into a world of unmissable Sky Original films, from psychological thriller To Catch a Killer to the Oscar-nominated The Unites States vs Billie Holiday

programme.title: Red Dragon (2002)
programme.desc: The FBI agent who first captured Hannibal Lecter is called out of retirement to catch a demented murderer dubbed the Tooth Fairy, who slaughters a family whenever there is a full moon - forcing the detective to draw on the imprisoned cannibal's expertise in criminal psychology. Thriller prequel adapted from the first of Thomas Harris's Lecter novels, starring Anthony Hopkins, Edward Norton, Ralph Fiennes and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Detroit (2017)
programme.desc: A group of rogue police officers responds to a complaint with apparent retribution rather than justice in mind, launching a raid on a group of African-Americans. Public anger reaches a peak after the incident, as relationships sour with authority. Fact-based drama set during the 1967 Detroit riots, starring John Boyega, Anthony Mackie and Algee Smith

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: Don't Let's Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her family's Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali
